abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back:
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Serene Countenance:
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

abilities.name: Twinned Soul (Lelu):
abilities.text: When this model gains a Glutted token, a friendly Lelu may gain a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Blood Spray
triggers.text: An ally within 2" of the target gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Crack the Whip
triggers.text: Move enemy models within (aura)2" of this model up to 2" away from this model.

actions.name: Crimson Call
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models. This model may remove a Glutted token. If it does so, this action receives a (+).
actions.effects: Move the target its Sp toward this model.

actions.name: Sadistic Glee
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Other ally only.
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to the target. Draw a card.

triggers.name: Down Boy!
triggers.text: Summon a Corrupted Hound into base contact with the target.
